• About us

    I'M NEW

    Living Savior's Mission is to know the love of Christ and serve God so that the Holy Spirit may work through us to bring others to Christ.

    Learn more
    About us
    About Us Leaderhip Contact and Location
    Connect with us
  • Preschool
    Preschool

    We believe that Living Savior Preschool can expand the child's perception of God, of other people, and of the physical world in which God has placed us.

    Visit Preschool Website

Contact form

Please include your name, contact info, and a message. Your message will be recieved by the webmaster and secretary of Living Savior Lutheran Church and can be forwarded to other members or volunteers upon request.

Thanks for sending your message! We'll get back to you shortly.

There was a problem sending your message. Please try again.

Please complete all the fields in the form before sending.

at 8:30am

at 11:00am

Sunday School Times

K through 5th grade
at 10:00 until 10:45am

Confirmation, HS, and Adult
at 9:45 until 10:45am

For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life. (John 3:16)
